prompt: Create a vertical luxury skincare advertisement in a soft feminine pastel aesthetic, styled like a viral Instagram or TikTok beauty promo with no app UI. Show a single glass dropper serum bottle centered on a fluffy lavender-purple surface, photographed in ultra-realistic studio lighting with warm golden sunlight streaming from the upper left, soft shadows, glossy reflections, dreamy haze, and creamy bokeh in the background. The bottle label should read ELEGANT SKINCARE and SERUM, with a pale pink-lilac translucent bottle and shiny rose-gold dropper cap. Surround the product with an elegant feminine vanity setup: 1 gold-framed round tabletop mirror on the left, 1 lit white candle in a glass jar on the right, 1 pearl necklace draped across the lower left foreground, and 4 clusters of white baby's breath flowers placed in the left foreground, left midground near the mirror, right foreground, and far right edge. Add cute hand-drawn doodle decorations in white and purple: curved arrows pointing toward the serum, sparkles, tiny hearts, short accent strokes, and small loops scattered around the composition. Include 2 paper note cards: one left of the bottle saying My daily glow secret!, and one lower right saying Feels amazing!; add 1 small round lavender sticker attached to the right note that says "MUST HAVE". Use large handwritten dark-purple headline text at the top reading Glowy Skin In A Bottle, with a torn white tape-style strip underneath containing Nourish • Hydrate • Glow. Add smaller dark-purple copy to the upper right of the bottle reading "For Soft, Smooth & Glowing Skin", and at the bottom center repeat "For Soft, Smooth & Glowing Skin" with "Self care Everyday" beneath it in a lighter soft white tone. Keep the composition clean, premium, cozy, glossy, and highly aesthetic, with the serum as the clear focal point.
